messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: DIAGNOSE + ESCALATE — turn the rework signal into a ranked 'here is where I am suboptimal + likely cause + recommended action' verdict, surfaced to the human when the rate is meaningfully above baseline
How it works: A rate meaningfully above baseline produces a ranked suboptimality verdict

messages.author: swarm
